impound the waters or Indra's cattle. Sometimes the same cloud

For a scientific explanation of the Indra-Vrtra fight see Yaska^s
Nirukta, 11-14.
It is a fact that in the rainy season river waters get muddy
and polluted. They become pure only in autumn.

Sage Agastya, son of Varuna, removes sin through mere
remembrance; how much more when he is invoked ! I shall now
explain the mode of worshipping him for the benefit of kings as it
has been propounded by ancient sages like Garga.

science with religion. However, the objection would become un-
